title: Nereus Systems
tagline: Undergraduate Researcher on the Nereus Systems team
lede: Undergraduate chassis lead on the Nereus Systems team.

body: As part of the Nereus Systems team, I am the undergraduate chassis lead, working on coil fabrication, chassis preparation, preparing and populating custom PCBs, board wiring, installation, electrical testing and epoxy encapsulation.
More generally I also contribute to body fabrication and assembly, specifically related to the bulkhead, and custom payload assembly and integration.
